result:
Here's a summary of the changes I made to implement deep link support for the Subscribers and Traffic tabs:

## Changes Made

### File Modified: `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/deeplinks/handlers/StatsLinkHandler.kt`

**1. Added `"traffic"` and `"subscribers"` mappings to `toStatsTimeframe()`** (lines 108-109)

This is the core change. The `toStatsTimeframe()` method converts URL path segments to `StatsTimeframe` enum values. Previously it only supported `day`, `week`, `month`, `year`, and `insights`. Now it also supports `traffic` and `subscribers`, enabling deep links like:
- `https://wordpress.com/stats/subscribers/example.com` → Opens Subscribers tab
- `https://wordpress.com/stats/traffic/example.com` → Opens Traffic tab
- `wordpress://stats/subscribers` → Opens Subscribers tab
- `wordpress://stats/traffic` → Opens Traffic tab

**2. Added fallback timeframe detection in `buildNavigateAction()`** (lines 36-39, 51-53)

When the last URL path segment isn't a recognized site (e.g., `wordpress://stats/subscribers`), the code now checks if that segment is a valid timeframe. This enables deep links without a site URL to correctly navigate to the appropriate tab (using the currently selected site).

## How It Works End-to-End

The existing infrastructure already supported TRAFFIC and SUBSCRIBERS at the ViewModel level:
- `StatsTimeframe` enum already had `TRAFFIC` and `SUBSCRIBERS` values
- `StatsViewModel.getInitialTimeFrame()` already maps `TRAFFIC` → `StatsSection.TRAFFIC` and `SUBSCRIBERS` → `StatsSection.SUBSCRIBERS`
- `StatsViewModel.setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab()` already handles setting granularity when deep-linked to `day`/`week`/`month`/`year` (which opens the Traffic tab with the appropriate granularity when the feature flag is enabled)
- The `AndroidManifest.xml` path pattern `/stats/..*` already matches the new URL patterns

The only missing piece was the URL-to-`StatsTimeframe` conversion in `StatsLinkHandler`, which is what this change addresses.

### Supported Deep Link Patterns

| URL Pattern | Result |
|---|---|
| `stats/subscribers/example.com` | Subscribers tab for site |
| `stats/traffic/example.com` | Traffic tab for site |
| `stats/traffic/day/example.com` | Traffic tab with day granularity for site |
| `stats/traffic/week/example.com` | Traffic tab with week granularity for site |
| `wordpress://stats/subscribers` | Subscribers tab (current site) |
| `wordpress://stats/traffic` | Traffic tab (current site) |
